Part.Source:
For Each ORder EmpCod, FrpPgtoCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Exit When none UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //DUPLICATA new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 1 FrpPgtoCodExib = '1' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'DUPLICATA' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'N' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TLC' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '10000 - DUPLICATA' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //DINHEIRO new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 2 FrpPgtoCodExib = '2' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'DINHEIRO' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'S' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCCB' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '20000 - DINHEIRO' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //CHEQUE PROPRIO new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 3 FrpPgtoCodExib = '3' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'CHEQUE PROPRIO' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP FrpPgtoRecPag = 'P' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'N' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCB' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '30000 - CHEQUE PROPRIO' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //CHEQUE TERCEIROS new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 4 FrpPgtoCodExib = '4' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'CHEQUE TERCEIROS' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'S' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCC' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '40000 - CHEQUE TERCEIROS' EndNew
Commit
// UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) // //CHEQUE // new // EmpCod = &EmPCod // FrpPgtoCod = 5 // FrpPgtoCodExib = '4' // FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO // FrpPgtoNom = 'CHEQUE' // FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' // FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET // FrpPgtoRecPag = 'R' // FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 // FrpPgtoDest = 'N' // FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCCB' // FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '40000 - CHEQUE' // EndNew // // Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //PIX new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 6 FrpPgtoCodExib = '6' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'PIX' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'S' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCB' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '60000 - PIX' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //DOC /TED new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 7 FrpPgtoCodExib = '7' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'DOC /TED' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'S' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCB' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '70000 - DOC /TED' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //5.D00 - CARTAO DEBITO new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 5 FrpPgtoCodExib = '5.D' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'CARTAO DEBITO' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'N' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TBC' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '5.D00 - CARTAO DEBITO' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) //CARTAO CREDITO new EmpCod = &EmPCod FrpPgtoCod = 8 FrpPgtoCodExib = '5.C' FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO FrpPgtoNom = 'CARTAO CREDITO' FrpPgtoIsPedVen = 'S' FrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 FrpPgtoDest = 'N' FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TBC' FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '5.C00 - CARTAO CREDITO' EndNew
Commit
UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod)
//UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.FORMAPAGAMENTO, &EmpCod, 0, &FrpPgtoCod) ////PIX //new // EmpCod = &EmPCod // FrpPgtoCod = &FrpPgtoCod // FrpPgtoCodExib = '6' // FrpPgtoSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO // FrpPgtoNom = 'PIX' // FrpPgtoTip = '6' // FrpPgtoRecPag = 'T' // FrpPgtoAllFun = 1 // FrpPgtoDest = 'S' // FrpPgtoAllLocBan = 'TCB' // FrpPgtoCodNomPadl = '60000 - PIX' //EndNew // //Commit EndFor
